Interface ILasPointSelection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasPointSelector.

[Guid("0C957D12-DCC6-4AA6-BB74-177A6AD7D85D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasPointSelection

Properties

AsZlas

Indicates if output file(s) should be the Esri's zLas format.

bool AsZlas { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ComputeStatistics

Indicates whether or not to compute statistics for the output file(s).

bool ComputeStatistics { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DropVLRs

Indicates if Variable Length Records should be dropped.

bool DropVLRs { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

OverwriteOutput

Indicates whether or not to overwrite existing output file(s).

bool OverwriteOutput { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rearrange

Indicates if output point records should be spatially rearranged.

bool Rearrange { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

AddClassCodeAndWeight(int, int)

Add the class code and its associated wight.

void AddClassCodeAndWeight(int ClassCode, int weight)

Parameters

ClassCode int
weight int

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddPreservedClassCode(int)

Add the class code to be excluded from thinning - points with this code will always be selected.

void AddPreservedClassCode(int ClassCode)

Parameters

ClassCode int

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddPreservedClassFlag(esriLasClassFlag)

Add the class flag to be excluded from thinning - points with this flag will always be selected.

void AddPreservedClassFlag(esriLasClassFlag flag)

Parameters

flag esriLasClassFlag

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddPreservedReturn(esriTerrainLasReturnType)

Add the return number to be excluded from thinning - points with this return number will always be selected.

void AddPreservedReturn(esriTerrainLasReturnType ret)

Parameters

ret esriTerrainLasReturnType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Add the class code to be excluded from the output.

ClassCode int
